action.description:
Introduced by Senators Larson, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Ratcliff, Roys and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Clancy, Taylor, Anderson, Arney, Bare, Billings, Brown, DeSmidt, Emerson, Goodwin, Joers, Madison, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Prado, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Sinicki, Stroud, Stubbs, Subeck, Tenorio, Udell and Vining
